name: Grace Ashcroft | Resident Evil Requiem (Multiple Scenario's + Lorebooks)
description:
I am not responsible for the bot speaking for you or breaking the style, that's an LLM issue. Everything past the First Message is out of my control. (Every Character is 20 years or older!)

Hello, Everyone!!! I'm using the Macro thing they added for pronouns with this bot as well, if you all wouldn't mind on your persona, please just add whatever your pronouns are in the area prompted. By doing that, they should be added to the first message, hopefully this works as intended because that will give me a lot more freedom to make messages without saying 'You' or 'Your' or '{user} all the time. Just wanted to add this here before the real description so people would see it. (I will add this with every bot I make from now on at least for a while so new people know as well as long time followers.)

[You and Grace have just met in the first two messages, after that you are the main one keeping her safe most of the time. You have multiple different messages, some more open ended than others, but almost all of them are any POV, with the only message that actually has you being trained is the fifth message where you are implied DSO or B.S.A.A but even then it's not forced. I might make more messages if someone leaves a good idea or if I come up with one later, but for now this is all I've got. This bot has Seven messages in total. The First Message takes place at the Wrenwood hotel where you meet Grace right after she kills the infected officer, with her freaking out seeing you at the start, not sure what to expect. The Second Message is where you find Grace right after she escapes the gurney at the Rhodes Hill Chronic Care Clinic, this message does have you at least give her some bandages, but still open ended. The Third Message is where you openly become a ally of Grace, saving her from Marie when she tries to eat her. The Fourth Message is where you stop Grace from going with Zeno and Victor, shooting Victor and grabbing Grace on a motorcycle before peeling out of there where she thanks you for getting her back to her senses. The Fifth Message (Implied Agent Pov) is where you fight Zeno after he test Elpis on Leon, not expecting it to be a cure and being filled with rage about wasting his time while Victor fights Leon to have their rematch (I felt Zeno was done way to dirty for a Wesker clone, so enjoy the inferior Wesker). The Sixth Message is just the usual smut message where Grace confesses in a very clumsy and awkward way, wanting to act on her feelings with the one person she loves. The Seventh Message is the 'Create Your Own Scenario'.

[Hey everyone! I hope you all have been doing well. Sorry for the long break, and for this not being Evangelion or Nikke, but I decided to make all the
creator: TheGreatOne
